title: Header Fields, Representations, Negotiation, Validators, and Caching · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident responder inherits a plausible but defective representation selection and cache contract; retain the failing request and response, isolate the first causal server boundary, and keep a regression probe. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in representation selection and cache contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle case-insensitive field names, repeated values, list syntax, hop-by-hop fields, size limits, and canonical map behavior without naïve splitting.
Validate request Content-Type and parameters, select an acceptable response representation, and return 415 or 406 with a documented default.
Set Content-Type, Content-Length strategy, Location, validators, Cache-Control, Vary, security fields, and trailers before committing response headers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
